zh.lifeSummary: 當Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer於0989年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville45歲，母親Senfrie47歲。她於大約1010年與Roger De Montgomery I在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1068年在法國豪-諾門迪艾朋吉奧德莫享年79歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾法圖維爾-格雷斯當。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer于0989年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville45岁，母亲Senfrie47岁。她于大约1010年与Roger De Montgomery I在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1068年在法国豪-諾門迪艾朋吉奧德莫享年79岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪艾法圖維爾-格雷斯當。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Josceline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Jocelyn   as a girl's name.

variants.name: Jocelyn
meanings: Now normally a girl's name, but in earlier times more often given to boys. It is a transferred use of the English surname, which in turn is derived from an Old French masculine personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans in the form Joscelin. This was originally a derivative, Gautzelin, of the name of a Germanic tribe, the Gauts. The spelling of the first syllable was altered because the name was taken as a double diminutive (with the Old French suffixes -el and -in) of Josce ( see Joyce ).

en.lifeSummary: When Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer was born in 0989, in Normandy, France, her father, Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville, was 45 and her mother, Senfrie, was 47. She married Roger De Montgomery I about 1010, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1068, in Pont-Audemer, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 79, and was buried in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer est née en 0989, à Normandie, France, son père, Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Senfrie, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Roger De Montgomery I environ 1010, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1068, à Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer 0989 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville 45 und ihre Mutter Senfrie 47. Sie hat um 1010 in Normandie, Frankreich Roger De Montgomery I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1068 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer è nata il nel 0989 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Senfrie, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Roger De Montgomery I circa 1010, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1068, nel Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemerが0989年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiquevilleは45歳，母Senfrieは47歳であった。約1010年にフランスノーマンディでRoger De Montgomery Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1068年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアポント-アウデマーで79歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアファトウヴィレ-グレスティインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer(이)가 0989년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Senfrie(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 대략 1010년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Roger De Montgomery I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1068년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 폰트-오데머에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 팻우비레-그레스테인에 묻혔다.

mn.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: Shrewsbury, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer nasceu em 0989, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Senfrie, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger De Montgomery I aproximadamente 1010, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1068, em Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer родилась в 0989 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Senfrie, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger De Montgomery I около 1010 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1068 г. в местности понт-аудемир, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности фатоувилле-грестеин, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer nació en 0989, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Touroude, Forestier dé Saint Vaast d'Equiqueville, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Senfrie, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Roger De Montgomery I aproximadamente 1010, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1068, en Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
